companies.company_name: 中国太平洋保险（集团）股份有限公司
companies.evidence: Official group 员工招聘 page was reachable but exposed no role rows. An official Pacific Health Insurance page linked a Moka application portal; the public fetch encountered a redirect loop, so the subsidiary role inventory remains pending.

companies.company_name: 新华人寿保险股份有限公司
companies.evidence: Official corporate news index listed 2026 spring campus recruitment dated 2026-03-25 and system-wide social recruitment dated 2026-04-19. Both role-detail publications were on the official WeChat account and were unavailable to the current public fetch environment.
